name: sovereign-code-quality-mcp
description: MCP server for code quality analysis — cyclomatic complexity, duplicate detection, naming conventions, file metrics, refactoring suggestions.

tools.name: analyze_complexity
tools.description: Calculate cyclomatic complexity of code. Counts decision points (if, for, while, case, &&, ||, ternary).

tools.name: find_duplicates
tools.description: Find duplicate/similar code blocks (potential code clones).

tools.name: check_naming
tools.description: Check naming conventions (camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase) in code.

tools.name: measure_file
tools.description: Measure file metrics -- lines of code, comments, blank lines, comment ratio.

tools.name: suggest_refactor
tools.description: Analyze code and suggest refactoring improvements.
